title: setaria viridis var. gigantea
intro: Setaria viridis var. gigantea, commonly known as giant green foxtail or giant foxtail, is a variety of the foxtail grass plant, belonging to the family Poaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The plant is said to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and providing relief from digestive problems. The herbal preparations of Setaria viridis var. gigantea include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
